experiences.intro: Discover how Vinster has helped others find work that makes them happy.

testimonials.quote: Great to see what surprising insights a career report can provide. I enjoyed filling it in myself too. It took me back to my childhood and my first job. Those are lovely memories I had already forgotten!

I tried it out right away. After all, the proof of the pudding is in the eating. I was surprised by the results. Not that the professions that came out are necessarily my dream job, but I recognised a lot of the reasoning behind them.

I just spoke to someone I'm supporting with her career. She had received her Vinster report and was very enthusiastic. She completely recognised herself in it and the report gave her exactly the confirmation she needed.
I also had a report made to see how it works. And I was really surprised by the quality. The report was nuanced, personal and well-substantiated. This is truly an addition to my coaching practice.
Very worthwhile to fill in! It really makes you think.
My client wants to stop her work as an administrative assistant. She just doesn't know what she does want. Vinster helped her gain more clarity on that. The suggestions were surprisingly fitting.
I've now completed all the steps in Vinster. I think it's a really great tool. It forces you to think carefully about what you find important in work. And the report that comes out is truly valuable.
I went through the Vinster tool. Very practical and easy to do. The questions are clear and the report provides concrete guidance. I will definitely use it with my clients.
I think the questions in Vinster are really great. They're different from what you normally encounter with career tools. They really go in-depth without it feeling heavy.
I once did the Career Funnel with Heidi Jansen myself. Vinster feels like a digital version of that, but even more accessible. Very impressive how it's built.

cta.title: Ready to discover your ideal work?
cta.description: Start your career exploration today and discover what possibilities there are for you.
